title: Mercy (Lambda-class)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Lambda''-class}}
'''''Mercy''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The shuttle was used in a [[Rescue mission to Mytus VII|rescue operation]] near [[Stars' End/Legends|Stars' End]] to board the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Hampton]]'' and rescue two Rebel pilots, while two Alliance-flown [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] held off the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|escort frigate]] [[Furious (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Furious'']]{{'s}} attacks long enough for the ''Mercy'' to rescue the two pilots and escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Behind the scenes==
The briefing in the mission address the ship as '''''Oola''''', while the game mission and the mission objectives identify it as '''''Mercy'''''. As the latter name appears more often, this article assumes that it is the correct name.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
